docs.title: About me
docs.text:
Assistant Professor, Mechanical Engineering Department King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals (KFUPM) Affiliated with the Interdisciplinary Research Center of Intelligent Manufacturing and Robotics (IRC-Manufacturing)

I lead a research group working at the intersection of smart structures, piezoelectricity, structural dynamics, metamaterials, energy harvesting, and wave manipulation. Our work combines analytical modeling, finite-element simulation, experiments, and programmable synthetic-impedance circuits to study tunable and multifunctional piezoelectric metastructures.

docs.title: Education
docs.text:
Georgia Institute of Technology. Atlanta, GA.

  • (2020-2023) Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering.

    • Focus: Acoustic and Vibraitons.
    • Minor: Applied Mathematics.
    • Dissertation: Programmable Piezoelectric Metamaterials Leveraging Synthetic Impedance Circuits.

  • (2020-2023) M.Sc. in Mechanical Engineering.

King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals. Dhahran, Saudi Arabia.

  • (2016-2018) M.Sc. in Mechanical Engineering.

    • Thesis: Vibration of Axially Moving Small-Size Beams under Variable Electrostatic Force

  • (2010-2015) B.Sc. in Mechanical Engineering.

docs.title: Openings
docs.text:
Ph.D. and M.S. opportunities

Open to highly motivated Ph.D. and M.S. students interested in metamaterials, vibrations, piezoelectric systems, wave control, and intelligent structural systems. Students with strong backgrounds in mechanics, FEM, controls, programming, and experiments are especially encouraged to get in touch.

docs.title: Selected Publication
docs.text: Go to publications for a the full list of publications.

31-March-2026

Our paper "Roton-like dispersion and voltage enhancement in nonlocally resonant piezoelectric metamaterial beams" is now published.

10-January-2026 Abdullau Alharthi joins the group as a M.Sc. student. Welcome!.

20-Sep-2025 Hesham Abdu joins the group as a Ph.D. student. Welcome! 10-Sep-2025 Prof. Alshaqaq presents our work “Roton-like Dispersion in Nonlocally Resonant Piezoelectric   Metamaterials" at ASME SMASIS 2025.

10-Dec-2024 Ali Abdulai joins the group as a M.Sc. student. Welcome! 10-Sep-2024 Prof. Alshaqaq presents our work “Leveraging Rainbow and Acoustic Black Hole Concepts in Piezoelectric Energy Harvesting from Metamaterials" at ASME SMASIS 2024. 09-Sep-2024 Prof. Alshaqaq and co-authors receive the the Adaptive Structures & Material Systems Best Paper Award in Structural Dynamics & Control for the journal article Digital programming of reciprocity breaking in resonant piezoelectric metamaterials published in Physical Review Research in 2023.

15-Sep-2023

Prof. Alshaqaq starts as an Assistant Professor in the Mechanical Engineering Department at King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals.

docs.title: Journal Papers
docs.text:
1. Alshaqaq, M., and Hawwa, MA., 2020, “Nonlinear Behavior of a Vibrating Axially Moving Small‐Size Beam Under an Electrostatic Force,” ZAMM‐Journal of Applied Mathematics and Mechanics/Zeitschrift für Angewandte Mathematik und Mechanik”, 100, e201900104.

  2. Alshaqaq, M. and Erturk, A., 2020, “Graded Multifunctional Piezoelectric Metastructures for Wideband Vibration Attenuation and Energy Harvesting,” Smart Materials and Structures, 30, 015029.

  3. Alshaqaq, M., Sugino, C., and Erturk, A., 2022, “Programmable Rainbow Trapping and Band-Gap Enhancement via spatial Group-Velocity Tailoring in Elastic Metamaterials,” Physical Review Applied, 17, L021003.

  4. Sugino, C., Alshaqaq, M., and Erturk, A., 2022, “Spatially Programmable Wave Compression and Signal Enhancement in a Piezoelectric Metamaterial Waveguide,” Physical Review B, 106, 174304.

  5. Alshaqaq, M., Sugino, C., and Erturk, A., 2023, “Digital Programming of Reciprocity Breaking in Resonant Piezoelectric Metamaterials,” Physical Review Research, 5, 043003.

  6. Alshaqaq, M., 2026, "Roton-like dispersion and voltage enhancement in nonlocally resonant piezoelectric metamaterial beams.," Smart Materials and Structures.

docs.title: Conference Presentations
docs.text:
1. Alshaqaq, M., Sugino, C., and Erturk, A., 2021, “Programmable Group Velocity Profile Tailoring in a Piezoelectric Rainbow Metamaterial,” 19th U.S. National Congress on Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Austin, TX, 19-24 June 2022.

  2. Alshaqaq, M., Sugino, C., and Erturk, A., 2021, “Rainbow Trapping of Elastic Waves in a Programmable Metamaterial Beam,” 28th SPIE Annual International Symposium on Smart Structures and Materials & Nondestructive Evaluation and Health Monitoring, 22-26 March 2021.

  3. Sugino, C., Alshaqaq, M., and Erturk, A., 2021, “Programmable Piezoelectric Acoustic Black Hole for Wavelength Control and Enhanced Sensing,” 28th SPIE Annual International Symposium on Smart Structures and Materials & Nondestructive Evaluation and Health Monitoring, 22-26 March 2021.

  4. Alshaqaq, M., Sugino, C., and Erturk, A., 2022, “Digitally Tunable Non-Reciprocal Wave Propagation Using Piezoelectric Metamaterials with Synthetic Impedance Circuits,” 183rd Meeting of the Acoustical Society of America, Nashville, TN, 5-9 December 2022 (invited talk).

  5. Alshaqaq, M., Alfahmi, O., and Erturk, A., 2023, “Digitally Programmable Piezoelectric Metamaterials and Nonlinear Electromechanical Structures with Synthetic Impedance Circuits,” NODYCON 2023 Third International Nonlinear Dynamics Conference, Rome, Italy, 18-22 June 2023.

  6. Alshaqaq, M and Erturk, A., 2024, “Leveraging Rainbow and Acoustic Black Hole Concepts in Piezoelectric Energy Harvesting from Metamaterials,” ASME 2024 Smart Materials, Adaptive Structures and Intelligent Systems, Atlanta, GA, 9-11 September 2024.

  7. Alshaqaq, M, 2025, “Roton-like Dispersion in Nonlocally Resonant Piezoelectric Metamaterials,” ASME 2025 Smart Materials, Adaptive Structures and Intelligent Systems, St. Louis, MO, 8-10 September 2025.
